name: Itasca Bank & Trust Co.
description_short: Itasca Bank & Trust Co. is a community bank offering savings accounts, loans, mortgages, and investment services with locations in Itasca and Roselle.
description_long:
Itasca Bank & Trust Co. is a regional community bank serving the Itasca and Roselle areas with a focus on personalized banking services and community engagement. The bank has operated for over 25 years with a documented commitment to supporting women business owners and entrepreneurs through its Women's Initiative program, demonstrating deep roots in local economic development.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial products including savings accounts, CD bonus savings accounts, personal and commercial loans, mortgage services, investment services through LPL Financial, debit and credit cards, online and mobile banking, and trust services. They provide convenient access through multiple physical locations, a mobile app available on iOS and Android, 24/7 online banking, and surcharge-free ATM access both at bank locations and through the nationwide MoneyPass network (plus additional ATMs at the Itasca Country Club and Wood Dale Train Station).

Itasca Bank distinguishes itself through community-focused initiatives, particularly its 25+ year Women's Initiative program, and through modern banking conveniences including Zelle integration in bill pay, CardValet mobile debit card controls, and ClickSWITCH for easy account transfers. Recent leadership appointments, including a Chief Operating Officer with extensive regulatory experience, suggest institutional stability and professional management. The bank maintains an established routing number (071922175) and appears committed to both traditional banking services and digital innovation.

As a regional community bank, Itasca Bank & Trust Co. is best suited for customers seeking personalized service with local presence rather than national scale. The bank appears professionally managed and offers legitimate banking services, though as a smaller regional institution, it may have more limited product breadth than larger national banks. Customers should verify current rates and terms directly, as community banks often have competitive but variable offerings. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Savings accounts and CD bonus savings accounts
pros: Surcharge-free ATM access nationwide through MoneyPass network plus additional ATMs at local venues
25+ year Women's Initiative program specifically supporting women business owners and entrepreneurs
Integration of modern conveniences including Zelle, CardValet fraud prevention, and ClickSWITCH direct deposit switching
Investment services available through partnership with LPL Financial at bank locations
Mobile app available on both iOS and Android for account access and management
Simplified mortgage services with stated focus on customer experience
Experienced leadership including new Chief Operating Officer with banking regulatory background
cons: Limited geographic presence with only two physical locations (Itasca and Roselle)
As a regional bank, may have fewer product options or competitive rates compared to national institutions
Website does not prominently display current rate information, requiring customer contact for CD and savings rates

contact.address: 308 W Irving Park Rd, Itasca, IL 60143

best_for: Women business owners and entrepreneurs seeking community banking support
Itasca and Roselle area residents wanting personalized local banking relationships
Customers seeking mortgage services with simplified, customer-focused processes
Individuals interested in investment services through established financial partnerships
diagnosis: Itasca Bank & Trust Co. is best for customers in the Itasca/Roselle area seeking traditional community banking with modern digital conveniences and personalized service. The main caveat is that as a small regional bank with only two physical locations, it offers less geographic convenience and potentially fewer competitive offerings than large national banks, making it most suitable for local residents prioritizing relationship banking over broad product selection.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 308 W Irving Park Rd, Itasca, IL 60143
